title: NOT Amey's PvP & FPS BOOST Modpack
description: A lightweight PvP + FPS-boost modpack focused on maximum performance
body:
Our modpack is built for players who want the smoothest PvP experience with the highest FPS possible. It’s lightweight, clean, and focused entirely on agility and responsiveness—perfect for competitive fights where every millisecond matters. With a minimal and distraction-free look, it keeps your screen clear so you can fully concentrate on combat.

Packed with performance-enhancing mods, it fine-tunes video settings, cuts down lag, and stabilizes frame rates for a consistently smooth experience. Everything comes pre-optimized, including render tweaks and streamlined graphics, ensuring top-tier FPS even on busy servers or action-heavy PvP arenas.

To sharpen your gameplay, unnecessary visual effects and loud, distracting sounds are removed, keeping only what’s essential for fast, fluid battles. Memory-saving tools and optimization mods ensure Minecraft runs efficiently, giving you fast performance even on low-end systems—making this the perfect setup for any PvP-focused player.
